tests.test_name: Analyze button is disabled when no input is provided
tests.description: Verifies that users cannot trigger an analysis without first providing any test case content.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Analyze button remains inactive when the input area is empty

tests.test_name: Analyze button is enabled when test case content is provided
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a test case file enables the Analyze button so users can proceed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Analyze button is enabled after file upload
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Analyze button becomes active once a test case file has been provided

tests.description: Verifies that submitting an analysis displays generated documentation in the output panel.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel shows documentation after submission
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are presented to the user in the output panel following a successful request

tests.test_name: Clear button resets input and output
tests.description: Verifies that clearing the analysis results removes both the output documentation and the test case input, returning the page to a blank state.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated analysis output is removed from the panel
The input area no longer contains the previously uploaded test case content

tests.test_name: API error shows an error message
tests.description: Verifies that when the analysis service fails, users see a meaningful error message instead of a blank or broken result.

test_coverage.verification_step: Error message is shown on API failure
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A user-facing error message is displayed when the analysis request returns a server error

tests.test_name: Format selection is forwarded in the analysis payload
tests.description: Verifies that the format and role options chosen by the user are correctly included when the analysis request is sent.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen format (e.g. 'playwright') is passed through to the analysis API rather than being ignored

tests.test_name: Testing layer selection is forwarded in the analysis payload
tests.description: Verifies that the testing layer chosen by the user is correctly included when the analysis request is sent.

test_coverage.verification_step: Analysis request includes selected testing layer
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen testing layer (e.g. 'unit') is passed through to the analysis API rather than being ignored

tests.test_name: Output panel clears when new content is pasted
tests.description: Verifies that pasting new test case content automatically clears any previously generated analysis output, preventing stale results from being displayed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after pasting new content
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Existing analysis results are removed when the user pastes new input, ensuring the output matches the current input

tests.test_name: Output panel clears when a new test case file is uploaded
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a new test case file automatically clears any previously generated analysis output, preventing stale results from being displayed.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after new file upload
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Existing analysis results are removed when the user uploads a different file, ensuring the output matches the current input

tests.description: Verifies that changing the output format option clears any existing analysis results so users are not shown output generated under a different format.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after format change
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated results are discarded when the user selects a different format

tests.description: Verifies that changing the role option clears any existing analysis results so users are not shown output generated for a different role.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after role change
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated results are discarded when the user selects a different role

tests.test_name: Changing add-ons selection clears analysis result
tests.description: Verifies that enabling or changing an add-on option clears any existing analysis results so the output stays consistent with the current configuration.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after add-on selection changes
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated results are discarded when the user selects a different add-on (e.g. 'Technical Review')

tests.test_name: Changing data dictionary clears analysis result
tests.description: Verifies that changing the data dictionary selection clears any existing analysis results so the output stays consistent with the current configuration.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after dictionary change
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated results are discarded when the user selects a different data dictionary

tests.test_name: Changing testing layers clears analysis result
tests.description: Verifies that changing the testing layer selection clears any existing analysis results so the output stays consistent with the current configuration.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after testing layer change
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously generated results are discarded when the user selects a different testing layer

tests.test_name: Test case input persists after navigating away and back
tests.description: Verifies that a user's uploaded test case content is preserved when they leave and return to the Analyze page, so they do not lose their work.

test_coverage.verification_step: Test case box is still populated after navigation
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The input area retains the previously uploaded file content when the user navigates away and returns

tests.test_name: Analysis result persists after navigating away and back
tests.description: Verifies that previously generated analysis output is still visible when a user leaves and returns to the Analyze page, so they do not lose their results.

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel still shows documentation after navigation
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis results are retained in the output panel when the user navigates away and returns

tests.description: Verifies that logging out clears all input and analysis output so that a subsequent user session starts with a clean slate.

test_coverage.verification_step: Test case box is empty after logout
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The input area contains no content when the user returns to the Analyze page after logging out

test_coverage.verification_step: Output panel is cleared after logout
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Any previously generated analysis results are no longer visible after the user logs out
